case_title: ROMAYN WILLIAMS VS. REDMINT WELLNESS & HOLISTIC SELFCARE & ACUPUNCTURE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAMS C. LYNN. PLAINTIFF ROMAYN WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REDMINT WELLNESS & HOLISTIC SELFCARE & ACUPUNCTURE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARQUIS RHODES, SUPERVISOR. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM C. LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, ROMAYN AS TO DEFENDANT REDMINT WELLNESS & HOLISTIC SELFCARE & ACUPUNCTURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ROMAYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REDMINT WELLNESS & HOLISTIC SELFCARE & ACUPUNCTURE $73.34 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $148.34, DEFENDANT REDMINT ONE, LLC DBA REDMINT WELLNESS & HOLISTIC SELFCARE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT REDMINT WELLNESS & HOLISTIC SELFCARE & ACUPUNCTURE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2022 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY WILLIAMS, ROMAYN REDMINT WELLNESS & HOLISTIC SELFCARE & ACUPUNCTURE
